principle: Consent is the grid. The demo accepts only explicit, revocable tab donation and runs only public, non-abusable verification work.

kill_switch.meaning: If paused is true, the page refuses to request or run work.

allowed_units.description: Fetch a same-origin public file, compute SHA-256, count bytes/lines, and return an honesty header.
allowed_units.scope: same-origin public files in this repository only
allowed_units.why_safe: It cannot scan arbitrary hosts, run arbitrary code, mine, crack secrets, or move unwanted third-party traffic.

forbidden: DDoS, load generation, scraping, or traffic laundering
